prs_triaged.title: [docs] docs: daily documentation updates for merged PRs (2026-02-27)
prs_triaged.author: github-actions[bot]
prs_triaged.rationale: Automated documentation PR following Diataxis framework. Updates existing tutorial (AGENT_MEMORY_QUICKSTART.md), creates new how-to guide (cli-flags-reference.md), and documents recent bug fixes. All changes are additive or clarifying. No code changes, no breaking changes.

prs_triaged.title: feat: unified smart-orchestrator — replace ultrathink, auto-detect parallel workstreams
prs_triaged.author: rysweet
prs_triaged.rationale: Major architectural change replacing fragmented task execution system (ultrathink, default-workflow, multitask, hybrid, auto, work-delegator) with single intelligent orchestrator. Significant code churn (2k+ additions, 600+ deletions). Core workflow changes in CLAUDE.md, new session_tree.py utility, new smart-orchestrator recipe with 436 lines. High complexity with wide blast radius affecting core orchestration logic. Includes comprehensive tests (577 lines for decomposition, 261 for session_tree).
concerns: Breaking changes to core orchestration system
Migration path for existing workflows unclear
action_items: Deep code review of orchestrator logic
Verify all tests pass with >90% coverage
Validate migration strategy for existing users
Check backward compatibility with existing commands
